description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OSW-OS-test that runs on workflow dispatch, push, and pull requests to master and develop branches. The workflow consists of two jobs: Find-packages and build-OSW. The Find-packages job checks out the repository and submodules, and outputs languages and models matrices. The build-OSW job depends on Find-packages, uses the matrices to compile firmware for different languages and models, and uploads the firmware artifacts.
